title: CodeScope MCP Preflight
hook: Local-first repository intelligence that decides whether code should be reused, extended, or created.
editorialSafeguard: Use repository-documented test and coverage figures only after re-running the current suite.

title: CareVision
hook: Multimodal clinical decision-support PWA designed around explainability, secure workflows, and practical field use.
editorialSafeguard: Medical decision support only; avoid diagnostic or clinical-outcome claims.

title: SentinelIQ
hook: NASA turbofan remaining-useful-life forecasting with anomaly detection, explainability, and maintenance planning.
editorialSafeguard: Do not publish a winning-model or RMSE claim until contradictory repository tables are reconciled.

title: TopoLite-KD
hook: Lightweight topology-aware knowledge distillation for COVID-19 CT-slice classification.
editorialSafeguard: Present as academic research; preserve authorship and limitations; no clinical deployment claims.

title: AdaptIQ / ForecastAI
hook: An end-to-end forecasting SaaS that turns uploaded retail data into forecasts, scenarios, confidence ranges, monitoring, and reports.
editorialSafeguard: This is the canonical Walmart case study. The standalone repository is described as an earlier development stage, not a second card. Avoid “98.77% accuracy” unless the metric is precisely verified and named.

title: VITAL-LINK
hook: A multimodal clinical prototype combining chest X-ray, lung audio, and patient vitals into one assisted-review workflow.
editorialSafeguard: Keep the child project while hiding its parent collection repository from the visible portfolio.

title: Evershine Academy LMS
hook: A private client education platform bringing admissions, programs, campus information, and LMS access into one public experience.
editorialSafeguard: Never show a GitHub/source link, repository status, commit history, or source-access wording. Display only the live-site CTA and “Private Client Project.”

title: AI Resume Builder
hook: A guided resume-building application with structured forms, live state, authentication, and PDF export.
editorialSafeguard: Use the verified live deployment; keep copy outcome-focused.

title: Personalized AI Learning Dashboard
hook: A learning-management workspace for goals, resources, reminders, reports, analytics, and AI-assisted study support.
editorialSafeguard: Display this professional title instead of the repository name “new.”

title: COVID-19 Global Analytics Platform
hook: A full-stack pandemic analytics platform with automated ETL, database-backed APIs, and an interactive dashboard.
editorialSafeguard: Keep the child project; hide the parent collection repository.

title: Pakistan E-commerce Price Prediction
hook: A price-prediction workflow built around Pakistani e-commerce transaction data and deployable inference.
editorialSafeguard: Do not publish R² or row-count claims until notebook outputs are checked.

title: Vendor Performance Analysis
hook: A procurement and inventory analysis workflow connecting sales, purchases, pricing, invoices, and vendor performance.
editorialSafeguard: Large dataset counts are repository claims; show only after validation or label as documented scope.

title: MNIST Logistic Regression
hook: A compact handwritten-digit classification pipeline with custom IDX loading, preprocessing, training, evaluation, persistence, and CLI prediction.
editorialSafeguard: Keep as a compact lab; verify reported accuracy before publishing.

title: Email / SMS Spam Classifier
hook: A Streamlit text-classification app using normalized text, TF-IDF features, and logistic regression.
editorialSafeguard: Remove the hard-coded local Windows path before calling it production-ready.

title: Netflix Data Analysis
hook: Exploratory analysis of movie metadata, genres, release patterns, popularity, and feature relationships.
editorialSafeguard: Present as exploratory analysis, not predictive modeling.

title: Employee Information Form
hook: A reactive R Shiny form with validation, dates, file upload, and structured output.
editorialSafeguard: Keep the app as a child lab; hide the parent collection repository.

title: CSV Data Cleaner
hook: A small R Shiny utility for uploading, previewing, cleaning, and downloading tabular data.
editorialSafeguard: Keep the app as a child tool; hide the parent collection repository.
